# Proverbs 12

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-INDEX (verse table + nav; auto-generated — safe to regenerate) -->

↑ [Proverbs](../README.md)  ·  [‹ Proverbs 11](../Proverbs-11/README.md)  ·  [Proverbs 13 ›](../Proverbs-13/README.md)

## Verses (28)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | A lover of training is a lover of knowledge; but a hater of teaching is like a beast. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | A good man has grace in the eyes of the Lord; but the man of evil designs gets punishment from him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | No man will make himself safe through evil-doing; but the root of upright men will never be moved. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | A woman of virtue is a crown to her husband; but she whose behaviour is a cause of shame is like a wasting disease in his bones. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | The purposes of upright men are right, but the designs of evil-doers are deceit. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | The words of sinners are destruction for the upright; but the mouth of upright men is their salvation. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | Evil-doers are overturned and never seen again, but the house of upright men will keep its place. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | A man will be praised in the measure of his wisdom, but a wrong-minded man will be looked down on. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | He who is of low position and has a servant, is better than one who has a high opinion of himself and is in need of bread. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | An upright man has thought for the life of his beast, but the hearts of evil-doers are cruel. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | He who does work on his land will not be short of bread; but he who goes after foolish men is without sense. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | The resting-place of the sinner will come to destruction, but the root of upright men is for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | In the sin of the lips is a net which takes the sinner, but the upright man will come out of trouble. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | From the fruit of his mouth will a man have good food in full measure, and the work of a man's hands will be rewarded. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | The way of the foolish man seems right to him? but the wise man gives ear to suggestions. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | A foolish man lets his trouble be openly seen, but a sharp man keeps shame secret. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | The breathing out of true words gives knowledge of righteousness; but a false witness gives out deceit. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | There are some whose uncontrolled talk is like the wounds of a sword, but the tongue of the wise makes one well again. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | True lips are certain for ever, but a false tongue is only for a minute. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | Deceit is in the heart of those whose designs are evil, but for those purposing peace there is joy. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | No trouble will come to upright men, but sinners will be full of evil. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | False lips are hated by the Lord, but those whose acts are true are his delight. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | A sharp man keeps back his knowledge; but the heart of foolish men makes clear their foolish thoughts. | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | The hand of the ready worker will have authority, but he who is slow in his work will be put to forced work. | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
| [25](BBE.md#v25) | Care in the heart of a man makes it weighted down, but a good word makes it glad. | [WEB](WEB.md#v25) · [KJV](KJV.md#v25) · [ASV](ASV.md#v25) |
| [26](BBE.md#v26) | The upright man is a guide to his neighbour, but the way of evil-doers is a cause of error to them. | [WEB](WEB.md#v26) · [KJV](KJV.md#v26) · [ASV](ASV.md#v26) |
| [27](BBE.md#v27) | He who is slow in his work does not go in search of food; but the ready worker gets much wealth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v27) · [KJV](KJV.md#v27) · [ASV](ASV.md#v27) |
| [28](BBE.md#v28) | In the road of righteousness is life, but the way of the evil-doer goes to death. | [WEB](WEB.md#v28) · [KJV](KJV.md#v28) · [ASV](ASV.md#v28) |
